checks.label: API-Football key
checks.action: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY for direct browser calls, or deploy the data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY so lineups, injuries, standings and API-Football odds can be read back without exposing the key.

checks.label: Football-Data.org matches and standings backup
checks.action: Set FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN on the Worker/Pages runtime, or VITE_FOOTBALL_DATA_TOKEN for direct diagnostics, so matches and standings can be read back as the stable schedule/ranking backup.

checks.label: Production fixture targets
checks.action: Run bun run scout:data-targets or set KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_IDS to fixtures that return lineups, injuries, odds and standings.

checks.label: Fixture signal matrix
checks.action: Run bun run scout:data-targets so KICKOFF_VERIFY_FIXTURE_SIGNAL_MATRIX covers every target fixture with positive lineups, injuries, odds and standings rows.

checks.label: Odds provider
checks.action: Configure API-Football odds through VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY or the data proxy APIFOOTBALL_KEY, or set VITE_ODDS_API_SPORT_KEY with server-side ODDS_API_KEY on the data proxy.

checks.label: Static hosting data proxy
checks.action: Deploy server/data-proxy-worker.mjs as a Worker URL, or deploy the bundled Pages function and set VITE_DATA_PROXY_SAME_ORIGIN=1.

checks.label: API-Football enrichment limit
checks.action: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_ENRICHMENT_LIMIT to a positive value no larger than 50 to protect quota.

checks.label: Data scout search window
checks.action: Set KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_LIMIT and KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_TARGETS, or provide KICKOFF_DATA_SCOUT_FIXTURE_IDS with enough candidate fixtures.

blockers.label: API-Football key
blockers.action: Set VITE_APIFOOTBALL_KEY for direct browser calls, or deploy the data proxy with APIFOOTBALL_KEY so lineups, injuries, standings and API-Football odds can be read back without exposing the key.
